ksa_text: Conduct data platform security assessments, including vulnerability scanning, access control audits, encryption verification, and remediation of identified security gaps in data infrastructure.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-T-012 (Data Architecture/Task) excluded as edge_case (composite 0.418, highest: DDaT at 0.418). Domain prior: edge. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with edge_case classification, composite 0.418, and Data Architecture (DA) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Data Architecture KSA (composite 0.418)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Data Privacy Specialist job postings does not surface this Data Architecture competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
